title: nephrodium tomentosum
intro: Nephrodium tomentosum, also known as the woolly shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. The plant is native to tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium tomentosum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as coughs and colds.
